description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named .NET that triggers on push to the beta-release branch. In an ubuntu-latest job, configure git line endings, check out the code, set up .NET Core SDK 5.0.x, restore NuGet packages for a solution, build and publish the app, get the current time, zip the release with specific exclusions, and upload the release with a generated tag and name, a custom body, and a prerelease flag.
